title: Senior Financial Analyst - Bank of Baroda - Growth Opportunity

jsonLd.title: Senior Financial Analyst - Bank of Baroda - Growth Opportunity
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Bank of Baroda! We are hiring a Senior Financial Analyst for our Raipur team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Bank of Baroda:
Bank of Baroda is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Risk Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Raipur, Chhattisgarh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Bank of Baroda!
